name: stuhub
description: A modern full-stack Stuhub for students, teachers, and administrators.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules && npm install && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run lint --workspace backend
